metadata.description: ICPC / competitive programming topics with prerequisite ordering, colored by category

nodes.label: Time & Space Complexity
nodes.description: Big-O notation, amortized analysis, complexity classes

nodes.label: Implementation
nodes.description: Careful implementation, simulation, parsing, edge cases

nodes.label: Sorting
nodes.description: Comparison sorting, counting sort, radix sort, custom comparators, coordinate compression

nodes.label: Binary Search
nodes.description: Binary search, ternary search, binary search on the answer

nodes.label: Brute Force & Backtracking
nodes.description: Complete search, backtracking, pruning, meet in the middle

nodes.label: Greedy Algorithms
nodes.description: Greedy strategies, exchange arguments, scheduling, activity selection

nodes.label: Divide & Conquer
nodes.description: Merge sort paradigm, D&C optimization, master theorem

nodes.label: Two Pointers & Sliding Window
nodes.description: Two pointers technique, sliding window, shrink/expand paradigm

nodes.label: Bit Manipulation
nodes.description: Bitwise operations, bitmasks, subset enumeration, XOR tricks

nodes.label: Stack, Queue & Deque
nodes.description: Stack, queue, deque, monotonic stack, monotonic deque

nodes.label: Heap / Priority Queue
nodes.description: Binary heap, priority queue, k-th element queries

nodes.label: Disjoint Set Union
nodes.description: Union-Find with path compression and rank, rollback DSU

nodes.label: BIT / Fenwick Tree
nodes.description: Binary indexed tree, 2D BIT, range update/query variants

nodes.label: Segment Tree
nodes.description: Segment tree with lazy propagation, iterative and recursive

nodes.label: Sparse Table
nodes.description: Sparse table for static RMQ, idempotent operations, Disjoint Sparse Table

nodes.label: Sqrt Decomposition
nodes.description: Block decomposition, Mo's algorithm, Mo's on trees

nodes.label: Treap / Implicit Treap
nodes.description: Randomized BST, implicit treap, split/merge operations

nodes.label: Splay Tree
nodes.description: Splay tree, amortized O(log n) operations, link-cut foundations

nodes.label: Persistent Data Structures
nodes.description: Persistent segment tree, persistent treap, fat node technique

nodes.label: Link-Cut Tree
nodes.description: Link-cut tree for dynamic tree connectivity and path queries

nodes.label: Merge Sort Tree
nodes.description: Merge sort tree for order-statistic queries on ranges

nodes.label: Graph Representation
nodes.description: Adjacency list, adjacency matrix, edge list, implicit graphs

nodes.label: BFS & DFS
nodes.description: Graph traversal, connected components, bipartiteness, cycle detection

nodes.label: Topological Sort
nodes.description: Topological ordering via DFS and Kahn's algorithm, DAG processing

nodes.label: Shortest Paths
nodes.description: Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, 0-1 BFS, SPFA

nodes.label: Minimum Spanning Tree
nodes.description: Kruskal's, Prim's, Boruvka's algorithm, MST properties

nodes.label: Strongly Connected Components
nodes.description: Tarjan's and Kosaraju's algorithms, condensation graph

nodes.label: Bridges & Articulation Points
nodes.description: Finding bridges, articulation points, biconnected components

nodes.label: Eulerian Paths & Circuits
nodes.description: Eulerian path/circuit existence and construction, Hierholzer's algorithm

nodes.label: Lowest Common Ancestor
nodes.description: LCA via binary lifting, Euler tour + sparse table, Farach-Colton and Bender

nodes.label: Bipartite Matching
nodes.description: Kuhn's algorithm, Hopcroft-Karp, Konig's theorem, vertex cover

nodes.label: Maximum Flow
nodes.description: Ford-Fulkerson, Dinic's algorithm, push-relabel, max-flow min-cut theorem

nodes.label: Min-Cost Max-Flow
nodes.description: MCMF via SPFA/Bellman-Ford augmentation, successive shortest paths

nodes.label: 2-SAT
nodes.description: 2-SAT formulation via implication graphs and SCC

nodes.label: Heavy-Light Decomposition
nodes.description: HLD for path queries and updates on trees with segment trees

nodes.label: Centroid Decomposition
nodes.description: Centroid decomposition for divide-and-conquer on trees

nodes.label: Tree Isomorphism
nodes.description: Tree hashing, canonical form, rooted and unrooted isomorphism

nodes.label: General Matching
nodes.description: Edmonds' blossom algorithm for maximum matching in general graphs

nodes.label: Dominator Tree
nodes.description: Lengauer-Tarjan algorithm for dominator trees in directed graphs

nodes.label: Classical DP
nodes.description: Knapsack, LIS, LCS, coin change, edit distance

nodes.label: Interval DP
nodes.description: DP on intervals/ranges, matrix chain multiplication, optimal BST

nodes.label: DP on Trees
nodes.description: Tree DP, rerooting technique, subtree merging

nodes.label: DP on DAGs
nodes.description: Longest/shortest path on DAGs, counting paths, DP with topological order

nodes.label: Bitmask DP
nodes.description: DP over subsets, TSP, Hamiltonian path, assignment problem

nodes.label: Digit DP
nodes.description: Counting numbers with digit constraints, digit DP framework

nodes.label: Profile DP (Broken Profile)
nodes.description: DP on grid with bitmask profile, tiling problems, plug DP

nodes.label: SOS DP (Sum Over Subsets)
nodes.description: Sum over subsets DP, subset sum convolution, Mobius inversion on subsets

nodes.label: Convex Hull Trick
nodes.description: Convex hull trick, Li Chao tree, slope optimization

nodes.label: Knuth's Optimization
nodes.description: Knuth's optimization for interval DP with convex/concave cost

nodes.label: Divide & Conquer DP
nodes.description: D&C optimization for DP with monotone decision points

nodes.label: Alien Trick (Lambda Optimization)
nodes.description: WQS binary search / Aliens trick for reducing DP dimension via Lagrangian relaxation

nodes.label: Connection Profile DP
nodes.description: DP with connectivity state, spanning subgraph counting, Steiner tree DP

nodes.label: String Basics
nodes.description: String representation, character encoding, basic string operations

nodes.label: String Hashing
nodes.description: Polynomial hashing, Rabin-Karp, rolling hash, double hashing

nodes.label: KMP Algorithm
nodes.description: Knuth-Morris-Pratt, prefix function, pattern matching

nodes.label: Z-Function
nodes.description: Z-function computation and applications in pattern matching

nodes.label: Trie
nodes.description: Trie data structure, binary trie for XOR queries

nodes.label: Aho-Corasick
nodes.description: Multi-pattern string matching automaton, failure links

nodes.label: Suffix Array
nodes.description: Suffix array O(n log n) construction, LCP array, applications

nodes.label: Suffix Automaton
nodes.description: Suffix automaton (SAM), DAWG, online construction, substring queries

nodes.label: Manacher's Algorithm
nodes.description: Linear-time palindrome detection, palindrome radius array

nodes.label: Palindromic Tree (Eertree)
nodes.description: Palindromic tree for enumerating distinct palindromic substrings

nodes.label: Suffix Tree
nodes.description: Ukkonen's algorithm, generalized suffix tree, applications

nodes.label: Number Theory Basics
nodes.description: GCD/LCM, modular arithmetic, fast exponentiation, modular inverse

nodes.label: Sieve Methods
nodes.description: Sieve of Eratosthenes, linear sieve, multiplicative functions, Mobius function

nodes.label: Euler's Totient & CRT
nodes.description: Euler's totient function, Chinese Remainder Theorem, extended Euclidean

nodes.label: Combinatorics
nodes.description: Binomial coefficients, Lucas' theorem, inclusion-exclusion principle

nodes.label: Burnside & Polya
nodes.description: Burnside's lemma, Polya enumeration theorem, counting under symmetry

nodes.label: Probability & Expected Value
nodes.description: Linearity of expectation, conditional probability, Markov chains

nodes.label: Game Theory
nodes.description: Nim, Sprague-Grundy theorem, combinatorial game theory

nodes.label: Matrix Exponentiation
nodes.description: Matrix exponentiation for linear recurrences, matrix multiplication

nodes.label: Gaussian Elimination
nodes.description: Gaussian elimination, systems of linear equations, matrix rank, determinant

nodes.label: Linear Algebra
nodes.description: Vector spaces, basis, XOR basis (linear basis), matroid intersection

nodes.label: FFT / NTT
nodes.description: Fast Fourier Transform, Number Theoretic Transform, polynomial multiplication

nodes.label: Polynomial Operations
nodes.description: Polynomial division, logarithm, exponentiation, multipoint evaluation

nodes.label: Generating Functions
nodes.description: Ordinary and exponential generating functions, formal power series

nodes.label: Geometry Basics
nodes.description: Points, vectors, cross product, dot product, orientation test

nodes.label: Lines & Segments
nodes.description: Line intersection, segment intersection, point-line distance

nodes.label: Polygons
nodes.description: Polygon area, point-in-polygon, polygon clipping, lattice points (Pick's theorem)

nodes.label: Convex Hull
nodes.description: Graham scan, Andrew's monotone chain, convex hull applications

nodes.label: Closest Pair of Points
nodes.description: Divide and conquer closest pair, sweep line approach

nodes.label: Sweep Line
nodes.description: Sweep line technique, event processing, segment intersection detection

nodes.label: Half-Plane Intersection
nodes.description: Half-plane intersection, convex polygon intersection, linear programming in 2D

nodes.label: Rotating Calipers
nodes.description: Rotating calipers for diameter, minimum width, maximum distance between convex hulls

nodes.label: Voronoi Diagram & Delaunay
nodes.description: Voronoi diagram, Delaunay triangulation, Fortune's algorithm

nodes.label: Circles
nodes.description: Circle-line intersection, circle-circle intersection, minimum enclosing circle

nodes.label: Minkowski Sum
nodes.description: Minkowski sum of convex polygons, applications in collision detection

nodes.label: Interactive Problems
nodes.description: Interactive problem solving, query strategies, adaptive algorithms

nodes.label: Randomized Algorithms
nodes.description: Randomized hashing, random sampling, Karger's min-cut, randomized primality

nodes.label: Heuristic & Approximate
nodes.description: Simulated annealing, hill climbing, genetic algorithms, beam search

nodes.label: Offline Algorithms
nodes.description: Offline query processing, parallel binary search, CDQ divide and conquer

nodes.label: Matroid Theory
nodes.description: Matroid intersection, matroid union, weighted matroid optimization

nodes.label: String DP
nodes.description: DP on automata (Aho-Corasick + DP), DP on suffix structures

nodes.label: Flow Modeling
nodes.description: Modeling optimization problems as network flow: project selection, closure

nodes.label: Heavy Implementation
nodes.description: Complex multi-step problems requiring multiple algorithms combined
